🔌 Wiring fired-census into /ork:telemetry-inspect

A tool nothing invokes is the exact disease this whole cycle cured. #2913 built the census reader; this gives it a caller.

1 The gap this closes

#2913 shipped scripts/fired-census.mjs — and nothing called it.
a script you must remember to run by hand = a tool that rots
That is the #959 / #2886 disease wearing a different hat.

2 Why telemetry-inspect is the right home

telemetry-inspect asks:  "is the FILE being written?"     (checks 1-5)
fired-census asks:       "is the WRITER running at all?"  (new check 6)
                          ↑ the upstream question — a hook can be wired,
                            reachable, and still never fire (#2886)
new cross-reference the pairing unlocks:
  writer ALIVE + file has 0 lines  → REAL DEFECT (it runs, produces nothing)
  writer NEVER                     → the #2886 class, advisory

3 Honesty carried into the skill (not just the script)

The skill instructions REQUIRE reporting the version-skew line verbatim
when true — the census comes from the INSTALLED build across ALL projects,
the closure from THIS tree. NEVER on a hook newer than the installed build
is expected, not a finding.

Explicit non-conclusions written into the step:
  · UNOBSERVABLE rows CANNOT appear (dispatcher children run in-process)
  · rare events (WorktreeRemove, PreCompact) look identical to a broken guard
  · "never call a hook dead from NEVER alone — read the guard"

4 Graceful degradation — verified, not assumed

$ HOME=/tmp/no-census-home node scripts/fired-census.mjs --json
{ "census": { "present": false, "records": 0 } }   exit 0
→ safe to call from any repo; absent census is a notice, never a crash
Verified: test-skill-md.sh SUCCESS (22 pre-existing warnings) · SKILL.md 160/500 lines · build mirrors the change. Lineage: #959 → #2886 → closure gate #2887 → fired-census #2913 → this caller.
